description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Server (C#) that runs on push and pull request events, excluding changes to WebAssets. Use a windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET 2.1.x and 3.1.x, builds, tests, and packs the project in Release configuration. If the push is to the master branch, push the NuGet packages to nuget.org using a token from secrets and upload the packages as artifacts.
